title: rosa × polliniana var. subcordata
intro: Rosa × polliniana var. subcordata, also known as the Himalayan rose or subcordate rose, is a hybrid of the Rosa × polliniana species, characterized by its fragrant, pink flowers and dark green leaves. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Rosa × polliniana var. subcordata include reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, making it a popular choice for herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and vitality.
